People: 1000: 10:00 Funeral services held at Jessie Lee Home over body of J. Pongitore. Body then buried with military honors in Unalaska cemetery. Colors half-masted during ceremony and during removal of body to grave. Board of Investigation of which Lt (j.g.) C. H. Avef is president met to inquire into the cause of the death of J. Pongitore, Sea 2c.
0900- 1600: In accordance with instructions from U.S. District Judge, Seward, Alaska, body of J. Pongitore deceased was exhumed and an autopsy performed by P. A. Surg USPHS (R) A. W. VanKirk.
1600 - 2400: Chemical analysis of stomach etc of J. Pongitore, deceased begun by Lieut (j.g.) L. B. Olsen.
